summary:
Formal definition of the Monolith Sober Layer Protocol.
Captures the 4-Layer Safety Cage:
1. Hard Deck (Code Limits: $500 max, Whitelisted URLs).
2. Constitution (AI Auditor: Laws against illegal/harmful acts).
3. Circuit Breaker (Heartbeat: Auto-kill on anomaly).
4. Nuclear Key (Human: >$1000 requires physical approval).
